title: Document clause-slice precondition on validate_regex_in_clause
description: validate_regex_in_clause (lib.rs:146) takes clause: &[form::Form] but only makes sense when the slice is bounded to a single if/elsif/else clause (no Block crossing). The correct slicing is enforced by the caller (validate_stmt), but the function's signature, name, and lack of doc comment do not capture this precondition. A caller passing the whole stmt would get silently wrong behavior. Add a doc comment stating the precondition.
